title: Schmaltzia muelleri
taxonomy: Schmaltzia muelleri is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. It is native to Central America and belongs to the genus Schmaltzia. The classification of Schmaltzia muelleri places it within the order Sapindales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The plant's classification is further refined to the family Burseraceae, which consists of tree species found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Schmaltzia genus is part of the larger family Burseraceae, and it contains several species of trees and shrubs.
uses: Schmaltzia muelleri has been found to have potential medicinal properties, although more research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
